column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty looking up at illuminated sakura in awe" | TEXT="綺麗…" P2: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty smiling softly holding a lantern" | TEXT="幻想的です" P3: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty pointing to the bright moon and sakura" | TEXT="月が綺麗ですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty reaching for falling petals at night" | TEXT="つかまえた" P5: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty holding a cup of hot sake under the moon" | TEXT="乾杯" P6: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty breathing in the night air deeply" | TEXT="夜風が気持ちいい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty turning around in the magical light" | TEXT="夢みたい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty bringing hands to chest happily" | TEXT="うっとり" P9: ACTION/PROPS="kimono beauty bringing a finger to lips under sakura" | TEXT="シーッ"
